title: ilex tsiangiana
intro: Ilex tsiangiana, also known as Tsiang's holly or Tsiang's evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex tsiangiana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ilex tsiangiana are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
